title: Blephariglottis ciliaris
taxonomy: Blephariglottis ciliaris is a species of orchid, classified within the family Orchidaceae. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other orchid species. Blephariglottis ciliaris is further grouped into the subfamily Orchidoideae, which is a large and diverse group of orchids. Within the subfamily, it belongs to the tribe Cranichideae, a group of orchids known for their unique flower structures. The specific classification of Blephariglottis ciliaris is as follows: Blephariglottis ciliaris (Thouars) Schltr., family Orchidaceae, subfamily Orchidoideae, tribe Cranichideae.
